description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a black synthetic body and metallic components. It has a collapsible stock at the rear, a pistol grip, and a prominent carrying handle integrated into the upper receiver. The barrel is relatively short and fitted with a suppressor at the muzzle, giving it a compact profile suitable for urban environments. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted just ahead of the trigger guard. The rifle's surface is mostly matte black with some metallic highlights, and the overall build suggests durability and functionality for close-quarters use.
description: A compact, black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, suppressor, and detachable box magazine, designed for urban use. Features a matte finish and integrated carrying handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, carrying handle, and suppressor clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor and barrel alignment, with minimal detail of the stock and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and upper receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and grip, with the barrel and suppressor receding from view.
